name: HR
description: Employee store: profiles, DBS, driving licence, right to work, contract metadata, document library, and portal requests.

dbs_crsc_mass_check_interval_days.tooltip: Mass DBS Update Service (CRSC) checks for all employees who are on the Update Service with consent and required fields. 0 = off, 1 = daily, or 2-90 = every N days. Set from HR People dashboard or here; applies within about an hour without restarting the app. If 0, optional legacy env DBS_STATUS_CHECK_INTERVAL (daily|weekly) still applies.

hcpc_mass_check_interval_days.tooltip: Mass HCPC register checks for employees with an HCPC registration number on file. 0 = off, 1 = daily, or 2-90 = every N days. Set from HR People dashboard or here; applies within about an hour without restarting the app.

appraisal_reminder_days.tooltip: Comma-separated days before period_end when open/draft appraisals appear in the daily reminder scan and digest email (e.g. 30,14,7,1,0). Overdue appraisals are included every day until complete or period extended.

appraisal_digest_email_enabled.tooltip: When 1/true, the daily scan sends one digest email to HR_APPRAISAL_REMINDER_EMAILS or admin/superuser addresses (requires SMTP env). Logs still record the scan when email is off.

declared_permissions.label: HR - full access (view, edit profiles, document requests, library)
HR - view employees, profiles, files, requests, reports (read-only)
HR - create employees and edit staff profiles
HR - create and approve/reject document requests
HR - upload or delete files in employee document libraries
HR - view per-employee activity log (admin + contractor portal actions)

changelog: Employee directory, document library, date of birth, richer admin dashboard. Public base: contractor theme toggle posts to sparrow_shared_contractor_ui (/contractor-ui/set-theme).
